artPrompt: An eager young organizer in a rolled-sleeve shirt and lanyard stands proudly amid the town green, juggling a phone, a blank clipboard, and a casserole dish all at once, hair slightly askew with first-week enthusiasm. Behind them, a knot of approving townsfolk and blank placards catches the golden afternoon light. The figure stands tall and bright-eyed, framed by leafy green and warm ivory, composed for a landscape framing, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Recall Organizer Trainee
text: Whenever Recall Organizer Trainee or another Organizer enters the battlefield under your control, create a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token.
flavorText: Day one: shadows Petunia. Day two: runs the phone bank. Day three: has opinions about the casserole.
